titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of NRS GD45/13/279

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=257 status=live modified=2021-04-04 14:42:09.147729+00 | translation moa=256 status=live modified=2021-04-04 14:42:11.797728+00

p.cl: Vniuersis sancte matris ecclesie filiis Malcolmus Comes de fif Salutem.

Sciant presentes ⁊ futuri me concessisse ⁊ hac carta mea confirmasse deo ⁊ beate marie ⁊ monialibus
de Norberwic in liberam ⁊ puram ⁊ perpetuam elemosinam ecclesiam de Norberwic cum terra eiusdem ecclesie ⁊ cum decimis ⁊ oblationibus ⁊ omnibus aliis rectitudinibus eidem ecclesie iuste pertinen
tibus ⁊ terram in qua domus predictarum monialium fundata est . scilicet que Gillecalmestun solet nominari . ⁊ terram hospitalis de Norberwic . ⁊ terram hospitalis de Ardros . ⁊ ecclesia 
de Kilconkath in terra eiusdem ecclesie . ⁊ decimis . ⁊ oblationibus ⁊ omnibus aliis rectitudinibus suis . ⁊ ecclesiam de largach cum decimis ⁊ oblationibus ⁊ omnibus aliis rectitudinibus suis
⁊ ecclesiam de login cum drumnach scilicet terra eiusdem ecclesie ⁊ cum decimis ⁊ oblationibus ⁊ omnibus rectitudinibus eidem ecclesie pertinentibus . ⁊ Athernin . ⁊ Mathriue . ⁊ dimidietatem terre de
Brech per rectas diuisas suas . Quare uolo ut prenominate moniales predictas ecclesias ⁊ predictas terras adeo libere quiete plenarie ⁊ honorifice teneant ⁊ possideant in pratis ⁊ pascu
is in aquis in moris ⁊ maresiis ⁊ omnibus aliis aisiamentis ⁊ iustis pertinenciis suis sicut aliqua abbacia aliquam elemosinam in terra regis Scott’ liberius quiecius plenius de Comite . uel Barone
tenet ⁊ possidet sicut carte patris mei dant dant [sic] ⁊ confirmant ⁊ testantur super predictis ecclesiis ⁊ prenominatis terris.

His Testibus . Domino Iacobo priore de Norberwic . Dunecano ⁊
dauid . fratribus meis . Waldeuo filio merlesuein . Iohanne filio Micael . Nesso de Rammisseia . Tom’ de kilmeron . Willelmo . de wiull’ . Malcolmo de maleuill’ . Alexandro . de blar . Henrico de Abirnid’ .
Willelmo norrensi . Waltero . Gregorio . Alexandro . Capellanis . ⁊ MVLTIS ALIIS .
To all sons of Holy Mother Church, Malcolm Earl of Fife send Greeting:

Let present and future know that I have granted, and by this my charter made firm, to God and to Blessed Mary and to the nuns of North Berwick, in free and pure and perpetual alms, the church of North Berwick with the land of the same church and with teinds and oblations and all other revenues rightly belonging to the same church, and the land in which the house of the foresaid nuns is built, that is, which used to be called ‘Gillecalmestun’, and the land of the hospital of North Berwick; and the land of the hospital of Ardross, and the church of Kilconquhar in the land of the same church, and its teinds, and oblations and all other revenues; and the church of Largo with its teinds and oblations and all other revenues; and the church of Logie with ‘Drumnach’, that is, the land of the same church and with teinds and oblations and all revenues belonging to the same church; and Athernie, and Montrave, and half of the land of Breich by its correct bounds. Wherefore I will that the forenamed nuns hold and possess the foresaid churches and foresaid lands as freely, quietly, fully and honourably, in meadows and pastures, in waters and moors and marshes and all other easements and just pertinents as any abbey freely, quietly and fully holds and possesses any alms in the land of the king of Scots of an earl of baron, just as the charters of my father give, confirm and bear witness concerning the foresaid churches and foresiad lands.

With these witnesses, the lord James, prior of North Berwick, Duncan and David my brothers, Waldef son of Merleswain, John son of Michael, Ness of Ramsay, Thomas of Kilmaron, William of Wyville, Malcolm de Malville, Alexander of Blair, Henry of Abernethy, William Norris, Walter, Gregory, Alexander, chaplains, and many others.
